_note: Updated by the legal agent after each task. Plain language — no jargon. This is risk analysis, not legal advice.

priorities.title: Check whether the Gemini API Data Processing Addendum opt-out applies to our usage tier
priorities.note: By default, Google may use API inputs to train future models. User-authored room descriptions are user content. We need to know if we can opt out and what tier that requires.
priorities.proposed_solution: Confirm whether the current Gemini plan supports the data processing addendum and training opt-out, and document the answer for the founder.

priorities.title: Draft the user-facing disclosure for AI-generated content before public launch
priorities.note: Users need to understand their IP position when using the Copilot. A short, plain-English disclosure covering output ownership and data usage is needed before any public launch.
priorities.proposed_solution: Draft plain-language user disclosure on AI-generated output and how their data is processed before any public launch.

risks_p1.title: EU AI Act disclosure compliance not yet formally verified
risks_p1.note: A disclosure failure is a compliance violation, not just a UX gap. Must be verified before any EU-facing launch.

risks_p1.title: Gemini API data processing opt-out status unknown
risks_p1.note: Until we know our DPA status, user-authored content may be used for model training without user consent. GDPR Article 6 exposure.

founder_decisions.title: Does the current Gemini API plan include the Data Processing Addendum opt-out?
founder_decisions.note: This determines whether user room descriptions can be sent to the Gemini API without additional consent mechanisms.

actions.name: IP Review
actions.description: IP exposure assessment for an AI feature — user IP status, output ownership, training data risk, recommended disclosures.
actions.trigger: Any new AI feature, content generation workflow, or user-generated content surface

actions.name: ToS Check
actions.description: Material obligations and restrictions of an API ToS relevant to this product — plain language summary with citations.
actions.trigger: Before any new API integration, or when a provider updates their ToS

actions.name: Privacy Audit
actions.description: GDPR/CCPA/EU AI Act obligations for a new data flow — disclosure requirements, consent mechanisms, DPA status.
actions.trigger: Any new data flow to external APIs or new user data collection

actions.name: Launch Legal Review
actions.description: AI disclosure compliance, output IP status, and data processing obligations — go/flag/block recommendation.
actions.trigger: Before any public-facing launch or feature release

opportunities.title: Review all open-source dependencies for GPL or AGPL license exposure
opportunities.note: Any GPL/AGPL dependency could impose copyleft obligations on the product. Needs a full dependency audit before commercial launch.
opportunities.proposed_solution: Audit dependencies for GPL or AGPL exposure and plan removals or compliance paths before commercial distribution.

opportunities.title: Business plan: go-live checklist before payments and mailing lists
opportunities.note: Next step from the initial business plan (Apr 2026). Before charging or collecting emails at scale: Terms, Privacy, AI disclosure, DPA status, and payment flow reviewed.
opportunities.proposed_solution: Draft one checklist (ToS, Privacy, payments, email capture, AI labels); have counsel review before material launch.
